# VoicePrompter

> VoicePrompter is a voice-controlled teleprompter app for Mac, iPhone, iPad and the web. It scrolls as you speak by tracking your words against your entire script, and on Mac the floating prompter window stays invisible during screen sharing and recording (Zoom, Google Meet, Teams, Loom). Built by indie developer Konstantin Suvorov. Free tier available; Pro subscription or one-time Lifetime purchase.

Key facts: whole-script voice tracking (skip ahead, ad-lib or backtrack and it follows), scrolls backward too, one-click "Start from clipboard", 60+ languages, on-device speech recognition, 5.0-star Mac App Store rating.

## Product pages

- [Mac app](https://voiceprompter.app/mac/): Native macOS teleprompter, floating always-on-top window, invisible during screen share and recording
- [iPhone app](https://voiceprompter.app/ios/): Voice-scrolling teleprompter for recording videos on iPhone
- [iPad app](https://voiceprompter.app/ipad/): Big-screen voice-scrolling teleprompter for tripods and beam-splitter rigs
- [Free web app](https://voiceprompter.app/web/): Free browser teleprompter, no download, works offline, on-device speech recognition
- [Teleprompter for Zoom](https://voiceprompter.app/mac/zoom/): Invisible teleprompter during Zoom calls and screen shares
- [Teleprompter for Google Meet](https://voiceprompter.app/mac/google-meet/): Invisible prompter for Google Meet presentations
- [Teleprompter for Microsoft Teams](https://voiceprompter.app/mac/microsoft-teams/): Invisible prompter for Teams meetings
- [Teleprompter for Loom](https://voiceprompter.app/mac/loom/): Add a teleprompter to Loom recordings (Loom has none built in)
- [Teleprompter for Riverside](https://voiceprompter.app/mac/riverside/): Prompter for Riverside podcast and video recording

## Guides

- [Blog](https://voiceprompter.app/blog/): Guides on reading naturally on camera, teleprompter comparisons and use cases
- [Best teleprompter app for Mac](https://voiceprompter.app/blog/best-teleprompter-app-for-mac.html): Honest comparison of Mac teleprompter apps
- [Free voice-activated teleprompter](https://voiceprompter.app/blog/free-voice-activated-teleprompter.html): What voice activation really means, free options compared
- [How teleprompters scroll](https://voiceprompter.app/blog/teleprompter-scrolling-methods.html): The five scrolling methods compared, from fixed speed to word tracking
- [About](https://voiceprompter.app/about.html): Who builds VoicePrompter
